svg.title: Ligconsolata Next Detailed Catalog
svg.desc: A left-right comparison graphic showing 171 Ligconsolata Next samples. The left side is shaped from a smoke-built font with liga, dlig, and calt enabled, and the right side is the same raw ASCII source with ligatures disabled.
svg.text: A fuller catalog of default Inconsolata raw ASCII versus Ligconsolata Next shaping.
更完整地展示默认 Inconsolata raw ASCII 与 Ligconsolata Next 连字渲染之间的差异。

g.text: Advance width preserved / 保持等宽
liga + dlig + calt verified / 特性已验证
